# YAGE

> A modular 2D game engine for TypeScript: hybrid OOP+ECS architecture, plugin-based, built on PixiJS v8 and Rapier2D.

## Docs

- [Core Concepts](llms/core-concepts.md): Architecture, lifecycle, ECS, scenes, events, DI, processes, serialization
- [Quick Start](llms/quick-start.md): Installation, engine setup, scene class, first project
- [Patterns](llms/patterns.md): Component, entity, process, and testing patterns; common gotchas

## Packages

- [core](llms/packages/core.md): ECS, DI, game loop, scenes, events (zero runtime deps)
- [renderer](llms/packages/renderer.md): PixiJS v8 rendering, sprites, camera, layers
- [input](llms/packages/input.md): Keyboard/mouse/gamepad input, action maps, rebinding
- [physics](llms/packages/physics.md): Rapier2D physics, rigid bodies, colliders, raycasting
- [audio](llms/packages/audio.md): Sound effects, music, channels, SoundComponent
- [particles](llms/packages/particles.md): Particle emitters, presets, pooling
- [tilemap](llms/packages/tilemap.md): Tiled map loading, collision extraction
- [ui](llms/packages/ui.md): Yoga flexbox UI, panels, buttons, anchoring
- [ui-react](llms/packages/ui-react.md): React reconciler, hooks, reactive stores
- [save](llms/packages/save.md): Save/load, @serializable, snapshots
- [debug](llms/packages/debug.md): Debug overlay, custom contributors, stats

## Optional

- Testing: `createMockEntity`, `createTestEngine`, `advanceFrames` from `@yagejs/core/test-utils`
- API index: see per-package `src/index.ts` barrel exports
